title: Big Potato Tilt ’n’ Shout – Fast-Paced Family Board Game for Adults & Kids | Shout Out Trivia Party Game with Categories & Bonus Content | New Board Games 2025
features: LIKE HAVING THE LAST WORD? A shouty-outy game where two teams go head to head over a category, timed by a marble-run seesaw.
INTERACTIVE TIMER: Not your standard timer. The speed of the seesaw changes throughout, giving the underdogs a chance to come back right up ‘til the last round.
150 FUN AND UNIQUE CATEGORIES: The category cards in this fun board game are all diverse and fresh, so all ages will enjoy it, and no game will ever be the same!
PLAY WITH FAMILY OR FRIENDS: This game for adults and kids is perfect for a table-top family game night or a party with friends. It also works really well as a two-player board game.
EASY TO LEARN, QUICK TO PLAY: Takes minutes to learn, so you can start playing and get to the fun stuff more quickly!
WINNERS: To win a round by getting the ball to drop into your winning zone. Win rounds by shouting out more answers than the other teams. Win 4 rounds to be crowned the champions!
